scope: Additional technical terms encountered in translation installment 05 (Surat al-Ma'idah).

terms.english: to leave out; to omit counting
terms.note: A standard formula in this work for not treating a phrase as a counted verse ending in a given counting tradition.

terms.english: to transmit; to transmit the counting
terms.note: Used when a verse-counting judgment is explicitly presented as a transmitted report for a named authority.
